entry.title: Ex Subj : My requirement is Excel file upload in Build apps. On Submit create SO in S4 system
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I need to design File Upload so user can upload excel with Order details and I can map it using API and create Sales Order in S4 system. 

As of now i need help with design part and Mapping part in Build apps. 

Best regards, 

KC

entry.title: Re: Implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

To ensure that the BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM is correctly called, please verify the following prerequisites and steps in your system:

1. Creation of Custom Field: First, create your custom field using the "Custom Fields and Logic" app. Ensure this field is enabled for the appropriate UI application if it is needed on the UI, and also for the custom form template.

2. Custom Form Template: If you don't have an existing custom form template that includes your new field, you'll need to create one. Utilize the "Maintain Form Templates" app to find the predelivered form template MM_PUR_RFQ_INTERNAL, which is used for internal requests. Download it, adapt it as needed, and upload it under the "Custom Templates" section with a custom name.

3. Assignment to Application: After creating the custom form template, ensure it is added to the list of allowed templates for the application object type "Request For Quotation" using SSCUI 102313 (Assign Form Templates)

 

Please also check the configurations in the "Output Parameter Determination" app. Ensure that your custom form template is added or replaces the relevant template there.

Hope this helps.

Jens

entry.title: Re: Handling Wildcards by using Mapping Tables
entry.content:
Hello Eric,

Thank you very much for taking this improvement request into account.

Best,
Xhoi

entry.title: Re: using selection screen tabbed block how to bind SALV, OOAOV,ALV ??
entry.content: The answer is already in the first line of my previous comment. You cannot include ALV in the selection tabbed block. You can only do this through MPP.

entry.title: Re: Generative AI-Based Script Optimization
entry.content:
Hi @Tom_2024 

We will update the availability in the blog as more regions become supported.

Best regards,

Kumail

entry.title: Fiori Change Document Reuse Component not found after Deployment in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library for Change Document Solution | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deploying it to the Public Cloud (as per the tutorial Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials), the app starts but fails as soon as a selection is triggered, showing the error: "

Errorfailed to load 'sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js' from https://ui5.sap.com/1.130.8/resources/sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js: script load error"

What are we missing?

We also noticed that in BAS, the .js files are accessed locally, whereas in the Public Cloud, they seem to be fetched directly from the internet. Could this be related to our issue?

BAS:

Deployed in Public Cloud:

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAPUI5 

SAP Fiori 

@kaidehmann -> Danke!

entry.title: Re: "DAOException: HibernateException" error in Onboarding
entry.content: Hello, Did you resolve this issue? Thank you and kind regards.

entry.title: Re: GTS Hard Block, follow-up documents created
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: I have run cj88 with no errors for a project with actual costs but no change has been made .
entry.content: There are many things to check. Look a the settlement rules and the settlement profiles, check the Allocation Structure in particular. Look at the period of the cost postings.

entry.title: Re: Translation of costing sheet entry
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional
entry.content:
Thank you for this very elaborate explanation. 

As the Q&A in the blog post show, several customers look for better resource management possibilities for enterprise projects. I have created an improvement request for this: 344965 - Restrict Unstaffed Posting for Enterprise Projects - Customer Influence

Please support this request by voting for it.

Best regards,

Kerisha

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: Thanks. What was the solution?? This number is for EXAMITY company. I spoke to them already and they said they can’t do anything and speak to SAP. So pls provide the steps etc.

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content:
Hi Arjith,

I called examity number and they helped me. It took half an hour to fix the errors,  and I could see the "Exam dash board" and "Exam appointment" tabs and "Start exam" button, and I could attend the exam on the same day.

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: I called EXAMITY again. A more helpful kindred soul answered. I said another examine has the same issue some weeks ago. She took some time and said she has raised it as a HIGH priority with Questionmark which is owned by SAP and someone will contact me in the next few hrs. She added that several students had the same 500 internal server error and question mark team helped them.

entry.title: TCODES limited to 20 characters in ST03N
entry.content:
I see some transaction codes in ST03N that are limited to 20. It  seems to be from an older  transaction runs i R3 version runs an application written in a S4H version. What could be the reason for this and can I find out where it is configured?

e.g. SYSCLO/CORE_CONFI_MDO IS  listed as {SCLO/CORE_CONFI_MDO

entry.title: Manage Sales Plans - Dimensions
entry.content:
Hello - we are in UAT testing for our S4/HANA Public Cloud instance. I came across "Sales Plans" and find that this could be a really useful App, however I would like to add Segment and Profit Center Group (hierarchy) as available dimensions to create a sales plan from. 

Does anyone know if you can modify the list of available Dimensions to include additional STANDARD fields? I am quite surprised that these aren't already available in the dropdown list.

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: Thanks a lot Nagalakshmi.

entry.title: Re: Read archived records from DFKKZP table
entry.content: Archiving is executed because the data is no longer needed for processing.  It sounds like one of two things is incorrect:  either archiving is executed too soon and should wait until such time that the data is not needed like this OR the requirement is incorrectly defined.

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: Please mention the steps you took. Or is it that The issue was at their end and they did all the fixes and there was no action from you?

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: EXAMITY said it’s out of their hands. They will escalate to Questionmark team and someone will call me to help out and resolve it.

entry.title: Re: Handling OData Pagination in SAP AppGyver
entry.content:
Hi @Murali_Shanmu @Darius,

Based on @Murali_Shanmu's example, how would you handle the ordering for each page? Let me explain: I have managed to handle the pagination following the above tutorial, which is nice. A record in my list displays a file name (primary label) together with a date when it was either created or deleted (secondary label).

I would like all the records to be ordered by date, so I applied an "ordering" condition to the Get record collection linked to the Even Page focused (List of values > Sort Property = date, Sort Direction = asc), however only the records of the first page are ordered by date. Same thing when I set the following formula to the "Record collection" input of the Set data variable: 

ORDER(outputs["Get record collection"].records, "date", "asc")

How am I supposed to have the rest of the records ordered as well?

I hope you guys will be able to help me with this.

Kind regards,

LM.

entry.content:
Hello,
After S4HANA conversion, we get error "No CO document item found for original doc. item BKPF / / / 0000000003" in transaction codes F-32, F-06 etc. What is the reason for this error?

Thanks in advance.
Ömer.

entry.content:

Looking for a Function Module or BAPI for changing Work center plant in a Production Order.

I tried  BAPIs – CO_SE_PRODORD_CHANGE; CO_SE_PRODORD_OPR_CHANGE but not found the way to change the Plant.

entry.title: Deletion of lines for Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone know how to restrict deletion of lines on sales orders per user?  The user should be able to create sales order lines but not able to delete them.

entry.title: Re: How to define multiple to parent associations in RAP?
entry.content:
Doing a more loose coupling by using association instead of composition was the solution.

The custom entity was then also declared as root entity and as a result also an own behavior definition was created for the custom entity.

With that in place the custom entity can now be used by multiple business-context specific entities which corresponds in the end to separate Fiori apps.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA live data connection with CDS view for Geospatial capability
entry.content: Is there a solution to this?

entry.title: SAPUI5 adoption becoming more universal
entry.content:
Having worked in the SAPUI5 team for many years, what could prompt me to now make a statement about how universal SAPUI5 usage is? While preparing some numbers for a business review, I was reviewing a heat map of where our customers are located and noticed a cluster at the bottom of the screen. With usage in Antarctica, we now have customers on all seven continents! The growth of SAPUI5 adoption among customers and partners matches its proliferation by solutions within SAP.

This picture is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 3.0 Unported license, UI5 icons added by me.

As the carrier of the SAP Fiori design evolution, SAPUI5 is the foundation of many SAP solutions such SAP S/4HANA since the beginning. Developers experience modern tools in SAP Build Code and frameworks such as SAP Fiori elements to efficiently develop and extend SAPUI5 applications. The combination of its power and ease of use is what drives its adoption both externally among customers and partners and internally across multiple development teams at SAP.

Now seeing uptake across different product lines as more development teams are realizing the value of using a standard approach across the company. While serving many SAP (and non-SAP) solutions, UI5 is modernizing itself at the same time, e.g. by introducing SAP Web Components to cover *all* Web technology stacks to boost adoption.

This reinforces the reasons why developers in SAP, our customers, and partners use it so heavily:

  • Consistent user experience across SAP solutions (and beyond).
  • Hundreds of enterprise UI elements to build professional user interfaces for an enterprise context while complying to product standards such as security and accessibility. With SAP Web Components, an important new Web standard is utilized to extend UI5 qualities to all Web technology stacks.
  • Flexible tools for any developer: SAPUI5 comes with a development environment and tools to efficiently build, test, and deploy apps. Both in pro-code as well as low-code ways.
  • Powerful extension options: You can extend SAP standard apps with custom code and customize UIs without any coding effort thanks to SAPUI5’s integrated adaptation capabilities.

How to join the UI5 community?

  • Learn more about UI5 with What is SAPUI5? and https://ui5.sap.com/.
  • Start developing UI5 with tutorials and demo apps.
  • Engage with developers, architects, and other technical leaders from SAP and beyond in the huge UI5 community:
    • online: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/ui5
    • in-person at UI5con on July 8th, 2025

entry.title: Re: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Ec...
entry.content: Hi Dominik, Thanks for the reply. But here my problem is I am not able to find the Project name in the Transport Organizer itself.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable now metadata could not be found.
entry.content:
Hello all, after a short period the sap support team has uploaded the metadata of sap enable now to raised ticket as an attachment.

Thank you so much for your help.

entry.title: 2 steps-Workaround for unavailable Excel export function in ALV report
entry.content:
Hello, as I realized that it may be helpful for colleagues SAP Consultants/Users, I'm also sharing here a workaround in ALV report when export button is not showing.

N.B : This requires the print button to be displayed at least, as well as an output device (printer) to be active in system.

  1. once your ALV report is displayed, click on the print button and select LP01 as output device (try alternative printers if LP01 is not available)

2. Go to transaction SP01 and retrieve the related spool-> click on the little blue square next to it

That's it! Local file export button is now displayed with spreadsheet export type option 🎉
 

Credits to my great snipping tool : Greenshot

entry.title: Re: how to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries using jt400.jar
entry.content: Hi, I am also facing the same issue. Not able to connect to AS400 on-premise through cloud connector from BTP CPI. Can you please let me know the alternative solution? Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Is there a way to generate a requote only with the added item?
entry.content:
Dear all

Under SAP S/4 Hana cloud Public, service quotation, there is a way to requote it. But doing that, the quotation is sent and redone with the complete item and not only with the additional item.

Is there a way or a different process to have a "subsequent" quotation linked to the first one with only the added item?

Thank you

Ingrid

This is because you have not yet added an ABAP Cloud project of your BW bridge tenant in BW Modeling Tools.

Dominik

entry.title: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2 ABAP Cloud Development in single class?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to create multiple APIs for tier2 to consume the same in Tier1. Is it advisable to create all the wrapper objects in a single class as a separate method or should we go with individual wrapper class for each classic API?

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management

Kind regards,
Marco Dorn

I also created a listbox and I would like to change the filter as soon as I select something from the list. Is it possible to do that or I should use something else?

entry.title: Public Sector Management in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

 Our customer's requirement is to have WBS element and would like to enable that in SF, which is enables cost assignment in position and Employee. I have worked on it and this is something new to me. Could you please let us know what are the impacts of enabling this will have in positions and it turn Recruiting Module as well.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Re: Deletion of lines for Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/1924792

To restrict sales order line deletion in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can utilize authorization objects and/or implement a custom solution in the form of a BAdI or enhancement to prevent the deletion functionality.

Please check below authorization objects. Might it solve your issue.

V_VBAK_AAT:
This authorization object controls activities related to sales orders, including deletion. You can restrict users from deleting sales order lines by removing authorization to activity 06 (delete) for this object.
V_VBKA_VKO:
This object controls activities related to sales order headers, and removing authorization to activity 06 (delete) for this object can also help prevent deletion of sales order lines.

Regards,

Neeraj Jain

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: Good one Lakshmi. Thx for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content: And it was all resolved in 1 call with EXAMITY?

entry.title: Re: How to stop Source HU proposal during Allocation Ware...
entry.content:
Hi @prasan_desi ,

Could you please try below steps and let us know the result.

Move the stock into another Storage type ( Clean the stock) , then configure space to 1 then reload the stock into...then Create pick WTask.

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Transport of COPA rule entries
entry.content:
Hello,
we have a COPA derivation with rule entries.

In the D-system with the table K9RD400100011.
In the Q-system with the table K9RP400100006.

What happens if I transport from the D-system again?
Will the transport fail or come with an inconsistency? Would it be required to then do rkedrcheck, delete the inconsistent steps in the target system and re-transport (to finally get the correct table).

Should I - before transport release from the D-system - delete the existing copa derivations with the wrong tables in the target system?
Thanks for help
Thomas

entry.title: How to keep warning message at Publish button in planning story
entry.content:
Hello,

I have Data Action at input page with not publish the data option.

Some times planers are missing to run Data Action after input the data and directly saving the changes by clicking the "Publish" button. So people are requested to keep warning message like :have you ran the Data Action  (Yes or No button) whenever clicking the "Publish" button. 

How to keep warning message when user click the "Publish" button in story.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Re: Intercompany STO and sales configuration
entry.content: Correct, there is no way to define two different document types in OMRY. As I mentioned in my previous post, you can achieve it only via an enhancement.

entry.title: Re: Add new fields to EDOC_COCKPIT Dashboard
entry.content:
first 1)add your field custom in table EDOCUMENT include CI_EDOCUMENT

2) go to implement badi EDOC_CUSTOM_FIELDS  method FILL_EDOC_CUSTOM_FIELDS

with code 


    DATA: ls_edocument      TYPE edocument,
*
          lv_process_status TYPE edoc_status,
          lv_BUDAT          TYPE  edocument-budat,

          lv_lifnr          TYPE bseg-lifnr,
          lv_kunnr          TYPE bseg-kunnr,

          lv_blart          TYPE edocument-blart,
          lv_BELNR          TYPE edocument-belnr.

    " Assign input parameters to local variables
*    ls_edocument      = is_edocument.
*    lv_process_status = iv_process_status.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_bkpf> TYPE edoc_bkpf.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_partner_data> TYPE edoc_vbpa_tab.
    DATA: we_part TYPE LINE OF edoc_vbpa_tab.

    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'BKPF' OF STRUCTURE is_source_data TO <fs_bkpf>.
    IF <fs_bkpf> IS ASSIGNED.
      lv_belnr = <fs_bkpf>-belnr.
      lv_BUDAT = <fs_bkpf>-budat.
      lv_blart = <fs_bkpf>-blart.
    ENDIF.
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'PARTNER_DATA' OF STRUCTURE is_source_data TO <fs_partner_data>.
    IF <fs_partner_data> IS ASSIGNED.
      READ TABLE <fs_partner_data> INTO we_part WITH  KEY parvw = 'RE'.
      lv_lifnr = we_part-kunnr.
    ENDIF.
*
*


*
*   .
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'BLART' OF STRUCTURE cs_ci_edocument TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ci_field1>).
    IF <fs_ci_field1> IS ASSIGNED.
      <fs_ci_field1> = lv_blart.
    ENDIF.
*   .

*
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'BUDAT' OF STRUCTURE cs_ci_edocument TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ci_field2>).
    IF <fs_ci_field2> IS  ASSIGNED.
      <fs_ci_field2> = lv_BUDAT.
    ENDIF.
*
*
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'BELNR' OF STRUCTURE cs_ci_edocument TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ci_field3>).
    IF <fs_ci_field3> IS  ASSIGNED.
      <fs_ci_field3> = lv_BELNR.
    ENDIF.



*
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LIFNR' OF STRUCTURE cs_ci_edocument TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ci_field4>).
    IF <fs_ci_field4> IS  ASSIGNED.
      <fs_ci_field4> = lv_lifnr.
    ENDIF.
*


  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: CCM settlement based on partial business volume, special GL indicator, final settlement without tax
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to do the following:

1. Enter a RES1 condition with a percentage e.g. 5% that should be applied only on half e.g. 50% of the business volume (in invoice quantity) and what has to be set for that, e.g. a formula or another business volume selection field?

2. Use special GL indicator (or another way) to post accruals to a GL account which is different from the GL account used for partial/final settlement and how can this be done. 

3. Make the accruals settlement to go to a customer GL account, as currently it doesn't have a customer account or not possible.

4. Is it possible when performing the partial/final settlement not to have a tax applied, as it is with the accruals, if yes, how.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Analytics Evolution : From Traditional Business Content to SAP BDC Insight Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, Insight Apps are delivered in SAC. They are designed to be hosted within the SAP Business Data Cloud and consumed through SAP Analytics Cloud. They are integrated with SAP Datasphere to prepare and model data products, which are then exposed as analytic models for consumption by SAP Analytics Cloud stories.

Thanks!

entry.title: Question about user locked
entry.content:
Hello,

do we have any control if a user is temporary locked.

 

How long is the locked, can we change the time? Can we unlock the user before?

Best regards

Guido

entry.title: Add higher duty or Temporary Assignment - Position to Job Sync
entry.content:
Hi,

 We would like to restrict few fields from syncing from Position to Job information only during Higher Duty/Temporary Assignment. To achieve this, we established an on-change rule at position field level and set another field called Sync as Yes or No, based on Event Reason. We couldnt write this condition directly in Position to Job Sync since Event Reason is not available in this rule scenario.

However, this on-change rule is triggered only when position field is entered manually and not when it auto populates based on the position selected in Higher Duty.@sa

Even the On Init Rules in Job information which is triggering for Add higher duty, doesn't retrieve the Event Reason or Event. Please let us know how to stop the sync for few fields only when Higher duty is triggered.

As per SAP Document, it is mentioned that it we should stop the position to Job Info sync in case of Higher Duty. Please help.

@sanjaykwadhwani

entry.title: Field Focus ZEBRA TC53 - Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are evaluating ZEBRA TC53 scanner without SAP WM functionality in the S4HANA public cloud system. The idea is to use the SAP standard Fiori apps released for scanning by SAP via chrome or Zebra's "Enterprise Browser".

We are leveraging ZEBRA's Datawedge functionality which allows for parsing and imputing the barcode to the target application. We have been able to setup the ZEBRA DataWedge functionality; however, we have to EXPLICITLY SELECT the field in the FIORI app before scanning is performed. Any workarounds or ideas around it will be helpful.

Thanks

entry.title: Big Upgrade! New and Improved SAP BTP Account Model Recommendations Are Here
entry.content:
We're thrilled to announce the release of the fully reworked and expanded Setting Up Your Account Model chapter in the SAP BTP Administrator's Guide. Whether you’re an experienced SAP BTP administrator or new to the platform, this updated content is designed to equip you with the knowledge to tailor your account model to your organization's specific needs.

What's New?

Explore these key topics, designed to help you refine your account setup:

Setting Up Your Account Model  – Learn how to set up your global accounts, directories, subaccounts, spaces and namespaces in a in a structure that aligns with your business and development requirements.

Cloud Foundry, Kyma, or Both?  – Understand the nuances of setting up account models for Cloud Foundry or Kyma, including how to combine them for maximum flexibility in both greenfield and brownfield scenarios.

Subaccounts or Spaces/Namespaces? – Explore the differences between subaccounts and spaces/namespaces and know when to use each for optimal isolation and organization.

Checklist: Drafting Your Account Model – Follow an interactive checklist, complete with step-by-step instructions to research and draft an account model that meets your company's specific business and technical needs.

Sharing SAP BTP Services – Explore options for sharing SAP BTP services across subaccounts for cost-efficiency and centralized governance.

Tools for Account Administration – Compare the key account administration tools - SAP BTP cockpit, btp CLI, APIs, Terraform, and SAP Automation Pilot. Understand their strengths and recommended usage scenarios.

 

Why This Matters 

A well-structured account model is crucial for efficient management and scalability of your SAP BTP landscape. This updated chapter provides the insights and tools you need to create a robust setup that supports your organization's growth and innovation.

 

Get Started Today

Explore the new content and start refining your account model. Whether you’re looking to simplify your current setup or expand into new areas, this guide offers best practices and recommendations to support you.

 

Your Feedback Matters

We’re always looking to improve. If you have questions or suggestions, give us feedback – your input is crucial as we continue to update the SAP BTP Administrator's Guide.

entry.title: Re: Deletion of lines for Sales Orders
entry.content: Hi Neeraj - thank you I will check into that.

entry.title: Re: Compensation history statement generation
entry.content:
Hi @vinkamath 

Lots of people get off cycle increases entered directly in EC each year.

Based on that, here are my thoughts. vs your requirement

  • The easier way would be to create a comp module statement template pointing to the last three Salary Review templates. But then I would call it "Annual Salary Review Cycles Compensation History" or something like that.
  • I don't know if Document Generation can use the "as of date" for each column of your mockup below. I know for a fact for having built a self-service Comp Statement in Document Generation that it can show the current value and previous value as of date picked on screen when generation the statement. So you if you use April 1st as a date to generate the document it will show the value as of April 1st and the previous value (even if it's from 3 years before).
    • Document Generation would be the best option in your case to build a HRBP self-service logic.
  • You could probably build exactly what you want with People Analytics Stories but I don't know about the "generation" part and if you can easily export in a nice PDF format from there. I doubt so honestly.
  • Last option to consider would be Open Text, third party but can probably accommodate all your requirements (to confirm with them).

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Migration of General Ledger Customizing ended with errors
entry.content: Hello Sanil . SAP note 2645957 does not resolve error FINS_ACDOC_CUST382

entry.title: Re: Migration of General Ledger Customizing ended with errors

entry.title: Re: RW011 Error in Invoice Verification—Is It Really a Problem or Just How It Works?

entry.title: Re: Migration of General Ledger Customizing ended with errors
entry.content: Hello. Anyone else that has error SAP FINS_ACDOC_CUST382 issued?. I cannot believe that SAP does not inform how causes this error. It just said " Solve the root cause for the errors and afterwards repeat the migration". This answer is absolutely inadmissible

entry.title: Order is blocked by GTS, Invoice possible
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

If a Sales Order is blocked by GTS the Invoice for Service Items can be created.

Is there a specific configuration which prevents this? We can only prevent the Outbound Delivery creation.

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Re: Sap Hana instance stuck at "Starting"
entry.content:
Hello former_member739482,

just had the same issue in my trial account. In SAP HANA Cloud Central an Instance stuck at "Starting" - after a while of impatience (around 5 minutes) I clicked in SAP BTP Cockpit on the link of my Instance ".....-db" and after clicking in Cockpit it is shown in HANA Cloud Central as "Running" (and green).

Seemed to be only an "display-issue".

Bye,

Regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Re: Error message requesting more days than you have in y...
entry.content:
Hi @NuriaPasCor : I could solve the problem using the manage languages tool. I downloaded the default tags and then the custom translation tags that the client had. I searched for the key that contained the message word I wanted to change and replaced it. I copied it into the custom translation file. I then loaded the file and it updated and reflected the change with no problems.

Thank you very much for your response

Nice day 🙂

entry.content:
Hi, 
i try this configuration for the schedule line but doesn't work.
Maybe is this not correct?

ET

entry.title: Re: How to use custom LLM end-points with SAP Generative...
entry.content: In case the external LLM is only expose to our LAN, would it be possible for AI Core to access it via the SAP Cloud Connector ?

entry.title: Transitioning from BPO to IT – Seeking Guidance on Free SAP Certifications
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am transitioning into SAP Ariba after 5+ years of experience in BPO (non-voice operations and customer service). While I have completed an SAP Ariba course, I haven't worked on any real-time implementations yet. Since I am presenting myself as a fresher, I am facing challenges in getting interview opportunities.

To strengthen my profile, I want to focus on the most important SAP Ariba concepts and complete free SAP certifications to gain credibility.

I would really appreciate guidance on:
Which SAP Ariba concepts should I focus on as a fresher?
Best free learning resources & certifications to improve my chances
How to gain practical experience without prior implementation projects?

I am open to internships, live projects, or any opportunities to gain hands-on experience. Any advice from experienced professionals or those who have successfully entered SAP Ariba would be really helpful.

Looking forward to your insights. Thanks in advance! 😊

#SAPAriba SAPLearning #CareerSwitch #SAPCommunity Certification

entry.title: How to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC?
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I am trying to import the currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table?

I came across the documentation bellow and followed the steps until step 7 where I got a blocker.

Import Currency Conversion Data | SAP Help Portal

  • First I have created the conversion table in SAC
  • After I have chosen the option to Import Data from Data Source

  • Selected the data source SAP BW (including BW/4HANA)

 

  • Next I have selected the Target Currency Conversion Table, the Connection and "Create a new query" option

  • Although on the following step, the "Next" button is blurred which makes me think something is missing, but I am not sure what exactly

 

Can someone please advise if something was missed?

Or is there a better practice to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC currency conversion table?

 

Many thanks in advance!

AA

entry.title: Re: Updating POD status in LE Delivery with SEND_POD activity
entry.content: Madhu - Did you ever sort this out? We have the same requirement at my client to post the Delivery POD when we get the POD in TM.

entry.title: Re: Related Request for Change (ChaRm UI field) not appearing in search criteria but available in Vi
entry.content: Can you please share the screenshot of the component/view AIC_CMCD_S / SearchResultView. Go to this view and expand the Context Node on the right side and display all the fields included there. Also, when you are in the view, go to configuration tab on the right side and click choose configuration to select the configuration displayed in UI. Then on the visible configuration, click More -> Show Technical Details to see the technical field names of all the displayed fields. If you find the relevant field here and the technical source, go back to the AIC_CMCD_S SearchQueryView and do the same and see if the same field can be added here.

entry.title: Re: Without Qty Posting option not appearing
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

What is the localization of your database?

For India localization, it can be related to SAP Note 1650437.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

Competency Name
Competency Official Rating
Competency Official Rating Description
Core Competency (Yes /No)

entry.title: Re: LMS purge users from success factors and external users
entry.content:
Hi, I understanf that people from external sites are external and native only users, but the information in the document, the native only learning, has the information like this is only  for system non integrated with SuccessFactors, and in the information says that the use the termination date for internal users:

 

That is why I am confused I understand that I should not use this purge process.

Ans in another page from SAP says that this is not fully suported:

Data purge for External Learners isn’t fully supported in SAP SuccessFactors Platform. If you need to purge External Learners, contact Customer Support for other purge options.

So I just wanted to know if this would be the case, if I haven't misundestud this. 

 

Regards,

Ana

entry.title: Re: How to use custom LLM end-points with SAP Generative...

@Cocquerel Hi!

if this would be an exam question I would click No, but I can be wrong.

entry.title: Infotype 0001 Inconsistent data exists in the database for infotype 0021 A - SF to ECC Replication
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is there a way to identify in ECC which assignment IDs have bad data in the IT0106 internal table? There are replication errors stating "Infotype 0001 Inconsistent data exists in the database for infotype 0021 A" where we can execute programs RPUFIXDS and RPUPAV00 to correct data inconsistency. We see this error in SLG1 and the assignment will fail replication. Currently, we are fixing the employees on a case by case basis. I would like to understand if there is an efficient way to identify these assignments, before they fail replication, so we can complete a mass corrective action. 

 

Thank you for your help! 
Holly

entry.title: Re: Calculated measure in a hierarchy of measures inside...
entry.content:
Can you please drop some screen shots how did you manage to create a hierarchy in a FACT view? 

Also do please drop some screen shots in the model preview with the hierarchy of the measures. 

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: Re: MDG. How to turn off auto replication of materials
entry.content:
Hello @Oleg_Turlov ,

SAP makes sure that the changes done in the MDG system are being replicated to the target systems.
Kindly check the below sap notes: 
https://me.sap.com/notes/2700769
https://me.sap.com/notes/3066745

The changes done via backend transaction (MM02/MASS, etc.) in a MDG or S/4 HANA system is replicated using BTE framework (either called via application MDGM or LO-MD) depending on the set up. This makes sure that your changes are synced across the landscape.

Question that you should ask yourself:

Why do you not want to replicate the changes done via backend transactions?

If you think that you want to place a hard stop on replication for changes done via backend transactions, then you might want to think about placing a control via an enhancement in the DRF outbound class for your implementation.

Regards,
Saikat.

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content: What platform are you working with? iOS or Android or Both?

entry.title: Reset or reset and reverse case in relation with payment and down payment
entry.content:
Hello All,
1- I actually want to ask one question. After receiving payment (DZ) from Invoice (RV) If I am resetting or resetting and reversing that Document, it'll open that invoice (RV) again and that DZ document will also get opened, now I have to make payment again of that RV. But how do I clear that DZ resetting document from proposed Items. 
2- Same case I want to ask for Down payment and Invoice. 

please provide me answer akin to FIORI apps.

Best Regards,

 

Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Vorstellung der SAP Academic Board DACH Arbeitsgruppe: "International Collaboration"
entry.content:
Sehr geehrte akademische Community in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz,

wir beenden die Vorstellung der DACH Academic Board Arbeitsgruppen mit der Arbeitsgruppe “International Collaboration", die von Prof. Dr. Marx Gómez, Prof. Dr. Uta Mathis und Prof. Dr. Hans-Jürgen Scheruhn geleitet wird, vorstellen. Ich habe die drei Experten wir zu ihrer Arbeit, Motivation und den Plänen für diese Arbeitsgruppe befragt.

Viel Spaß beim Lesen und gehen Sie gerne bei Nachfragen direkt auf die drei Kollegen zu.

André Biener (Director, SAP University Alliances)

****

André Biener (AB): “Hallo Uta, hallo Jorge, hallo Hans. Vielen Dank für Eure Zeit für dieses Interview. Könnt ihr Euch und Eure Einrichtung bitte zunächst kurz vorstellen?”

Prof. Dr. Uta Mathis (UM): "Sehr gerne. Seit 2001 bin ich Professorin an der Hochschule Esslingen mit einem Themenschwerpunkt auf Geschäftsprozessmanagement und ERP-Systemen. Hierbei nutzen wir auch SAP. Seit 2008 bin ich im DACH Academic Board tätig und seit 2022 neben Prof. Scheruhn Leiterin des Board.

In meiner Rolle betrachte ich zusammen mit anderen Kolleginnen und Kollegen, welche Aspekte beim Einsatz von SAP in der Lehre zu berücksichtigen sind, mit welchen wissenschaftlichen Themen wir diesen Einsatz verknüpfen können und was für unsere Studierenden in diesem Kontext spannend sein kann.

Speziell im Arbeitskreis Internationalisierung setzen wir auf den Aufbau von internationalen Netzwerken und Kooperationen zwischen Lehrenden und Forschenden. In regelmäßigen Online-Sitzungen tauschen wir Erfahrungen zu unterschiedlichen inhaltlichen Themen und zu unterschiedlichen Kooperationsformaten aus."

Prof. Dr. Jorge Marx Gómez (JMG): "Als Professor für Wirtschaftsinformatik mit Schwerpunkt “Very Large Business Applications” (VLBA) an der Carl von Ossietzky Universität Oldenburg beschäftige ich mich seit vielen Jahren intensiv mit den Themen nachhaltige digitale Transformation, betriebliche Umweltinformationssysteme und künstliche Intelligenz in der Wirtschaftsinformatik. 

Durch meine Mitgliedschaften in verschiedenen wissenschaftlichen und praxisnahen Netzwerken, darunter der Gesellschaft für Informatik, SAP University Alliances, Business Intelligence Roundtable und der Wissenschaftlichen Kommission für Wirtschaftsinformatik, arbeite ich aktiv an der Förderung der internationalen Zusammenarbeit. Besonders im Rahmen des Arbeitskreis Internationalisierung setzen wir uns für den Ausbau von interdisziplinären und interkulturellen Kooperationen ein."

Prof. Dr. Hans-Jürgen Scheruhn (HS): “Als emeritierter Professor für Wirtschaftsinformatik an der Hochschule Harz in Wernigerode forsche und lehre ich seit über 30 Jahren im Bereich BPM und Enterprise Architecture Management (EAM) an verschiedenen Hochschulen und Universitäten in aller Welt. (Mehr Details in der SAP Edition hier). Regelmäßig biete ich dazu internationale „Train the Trainer“ (TTT) Workshops online an, z.B. im ersten Halbjahr 2025 am 22. Mai und 11. Juni.”

AB: “Was bedeutet „Internationale Zusammenarbeit“ für Euch, warum ist es wichtig und seit wann seid ihr aktiv?” 

UM: "Es gibt sehr unterschiedliche Formen der Collaboration und reicht von einzelnen Lehrveranstaltungen im Co-Teachingformat und COIL (Anm.: Collaborative Online International Learning) Projekten bis hin zu gemeinsamen Forschungsanträgen und Forschungsprojekten. Dabei kann die Zusammenarbeit sowohl Online als auch direkt vor Ort oder kombiniert stattfinden. Spannend ist vor allem auch der kulturelle und soziale Austausch zwischen den einzelnen Beteiligten. "

JMG: "Internationale Zusammenarbeit ist ein Herzensthema für mich und bedeutet für mich vor allem die Zusammenarbeit mit Hochschulen und Forschungseinrichtungen weltweit – mit besonderem Fokus bei mir auf West- und Südafrika, Lateinamerika sowie Zentralasien. Ziel ist es, den Wissensaustausch zu fördern und gemeinsam Lösungen für globale Herausforderungen zu entwickeln. Gleichzeitig trägt diese Zusammenarbeit zur Stärkung der internationalen Mobilität bei – sowohl für Studierende, die ins Ausland gehen, als auch für internationale Studierende, die zu uns kommen. Aber auch der Austausch von Lehrenden und Forschenden spielt eine zentrale Rolle.

In der Wirtschaftsinformatik geht es nicht nur um technologische Innovationen, sondern auch um Wissenstransfer und die Auseinandersetzung mit globalen Herausforderungen wie Nachhaltigkeit, Digitalisierung und interkulturelle Kompetenz. Diese Themen sind für uns essenziell, und unsere internationalen Kooperationen leisten einen wichtigen Beitrag, um diese Ziele voranzutreiben. "

AB: “Was waren Eure internationalen Kooperationsprojekte bisher und welche Faktoren haben sie erfolgreich gemacht?” 

UM: "Es gab bei mir unterschiedliche Kooperationsprojekte, wie z.B. COIL-Projekte oder auch Forschungsprojekte. Erfolgsfaktoren waren immer zuverlässliche Partner, die mit uns an der Sache dranbleiben und Themen die wir gemeinsam bearbeiten. "

JMG: "Ein ganz entscheidender Punkt für erfolgreiche internationale Kooperationen ist, dass die Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe stattfindet. Es bringt nichts, wenn wir als deutsche Institution einfach unsere Vorstellungen vorgeben. Stattdessen müssen wir gemeinsam Ziele definieren und Visionen entwickeln, die von allen Beteiligten getragen werden. Der Mehrwert solcher Kooperationen entsteht durch gegenseitigen Nutzen – beispielsweise durch die Einbindung in größere Netzwerke, die langfristige Partnerschaften fördern und nachhaltig unterstützen. "

HS: “Neben vielen bisherigen Projekten läuft aktuell zusammen mit unserem Unternehmenspartner .msg sowie den akademischen Partnern MCI aus Innsbruck und UCT aus Kapstadt (Anm.: Sowohl Prof. Dr. Dietmar Kilian und Prof. Dr. Lisa Seymour sind/waren Mitglieder der jeweiligen Academic Boards in DACH und in Afrika) läuft aktuell eine Bewerbung für ein Erasmus+ Projekt für die Entwicklung eines neuen Curriculum zum Thema “Transparency and Fraud Detection in Public Procurement Processes“. Diese gemeinsame Beantragung und im Falle der Bewilligung gemeinsame Arbeit an dem Projekt ist für mich ein sehr gutes Beispiel für gelebte internationale Zusammenarbeit. Für mich war hier eine nahtlose Übergabe des Themas an meinen Nachfolger an der Hochschule Harz und gleichzeitig neuen Kollegen Prof. Dr. Frederik Kramer wichtig. Für meinen Kollegen Prof. Dr. Dietmar Kilian und mich geht es mit neuen Rollen und neuen Aufgaben weiter.“

AB: “Welche Herausforderungen gibt es in internationalen akademischen Partnerschaften und wie habt Ihr diese gemeistert?”

UM: "Ich habe bisher Erfahrungen mit COIL-Projekte, bei dem ich mit Kollegen in anderen Ländern gemeinsam verschiedene Unterrichtseinheiten gestaltet habe. Eine eher kleine Herausforderung ist, dass das Zeitfenster passen muss, was bei der Standard-Stundeplanplanung nicht unbedingt immer gleich passt, aber bisher immer angepasst werden konnte. Meine Befürchtung, dass die Studierenden bei Online-Projekten nicht kommen würden, hat sich nicht bewahrheitet. Unsere Studierenden fanden es nach einiger Überwindung toll, sich in englischer Sprache verständlich machen zu können und sich mit anderen Studierenden (USA) austauschen zu können. Um eventuellem “Schwund“ vorzubeugen, gehen die erarbeiteten Ergebnisse mit in die Bewertung ein. "

JMG: "Eine der zentralen Herausforderungen internationaler akademischer Partnerschaften ist die Nachhaltigkeit von Projekten. Oftmals werden einzelne Projekte finanziert, aber es fehlt an langfristigen Strukturen, um diese über die Förderperiode hinaus fortzuführen. Hier müssen wir in Zukunft verstärkt darauf achten, dass nicht nur kurzfristige Projektziele gefördert werden, sondern dass Partnerländer und Partneruniversitäten auch langfristig in der Lage sind, solche Initiativen eigenständig weiterzuführen – unabhängig von deutschen Fördermitteln. Das ist ein entscheidender Punkt, um nachhaltige und stabile Kooperationen zu ermöglichen."

AB: “Inwiefern haben Technologien wie KI, Cloud Computing und Datenanalyse die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Universitäten weltweit verändert?”

UM: "Für mich sind das eher weitere Themen, die wir mit den Partnern gemeinsam bearbeiten können. Vorteilhaft sind natürlich Programme, auf die wir einen gemeinsamen Zugriff haben und so eine gemeinsame Basis für den Unterricht oder Forschungsprojekte haben. "

JMG: "Technologien wie Künstliche Intelligenz, Cloud Computing und Datenanalyse haben die internationale Forschungszusammenarbeit in den letzten Jahren grundlegend verändert. Sie ermöglichen effizientere Kooperationen, insbesondere wenn es um die Verarbeitung großer Datenmengen in gemeinsamen Forschungsprojekten geht – etwa in der Klimaforschung, den Sozialwissenschaften oder der Medizin, die für uns an der Universität Oldenburg besonders relevant sind.

Cloud-Plattformen bieten zudem sicheren und ortsunabhängigen Zugriff auf Forschungsdaten und Werkzeuge. Dadurch können internationale Teams in Echtzeit zusammenarbeiten und ihr Wissen effizient teilen. Auch moderne Übersetzungs- und Kommunikationswerkzeuge spielen eine entscheidende Rolle, da sie Sprachbarrieren abbauen und die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Forschenden weltweit erleichtern. Diese Technologien haben die internationale akademische Kooperation erheblich vereinfacht und gezielter sowie effizienter gestaltet. "

AB: “Auf welche Weise tragen Kooperationsprojekte, dazu bei, globale Herausforderungen wie Nachhaltigkeit und digitale Transformation zu bewältigen?” 

UM:  "Nachhaltigkeit ist ein vielfältig Thema, das in jedem Land unterschiedliche Ansätze sowie spezifische gesellschaftliche, politische und gesetzliche Rahmenbedingungen mit sich bringt. Durch internationale Kooperationen können wir voneinander lernen und bewährte Praktiken austauschen. Das Gleiche gilt für Digitalisierungsstrategien – jedes Land verfolgt eigene Herangehensweisen, und der interkulturelle Austausch hilft uns, innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln und voneinander zu profitieren."

AB: “Welchen Rat würdet Ihr Universitäten oder Professoren geben, die die internationale Zusammenarbeit ausweiten möchten?” 

UM: "Das hängt natürlich vom aktuellen Grad der Vernetzung ab. Grundsätzlich kann man klein und mit einfachen Mitteln anfangen. Wenn man ein gutes Konzept hat, welches man ausbauen möchte, kann man auch darüber nachdenken, Anträge für eine Förderung zu stellen. Hierfür findet man i.d.R. im International Office der Uni oder Hochschule entsprechende Unterstützung. "

JMG: "Zunächst ist es wichtig, in bestehende Netzwerke einzutreten und Partnerschaften zu erkennen, die die akademische Einrichtung bereits hat – vor allem mit Einrichtungen, die thematisch relevant sind. Ein klarer Fokus auf Wissenstransfer und Innovation ist entscheidend. Dabei sollte man die eigene Disziplin vertreten und Netzwerke gezielt ausbauen. Universitäten sollten Austauschprogramme unterstützen und interkulturelle Kompetenzen fördern, um sich in einer global vernetzten Welt gut zu positionieren.

Darüber hinaus sollten gemeinsame Lehrformate und Module entwickelt werden, um Kooperationsprojekte zu bündeln. Es geht darum, innovative Lösungen gemeinsam zu entwickeln und die Universität aktiv zu engagieren. ProfessorInnen und ForscherInnen sollten ermuntert werden, sich an diesen internationalen Projekten zu beteiligen – es macht nicht nur Spaß, sondern bietet auch strategische Vorteile, da man nicht allein agiert, sondern im internationalen Verbund arbeitet, was der Universität und den Beteiligten zugutekommt. "

AB: “Wie ist Eure Zusammenarbeit mit den anderen Arbeitsgruppen des DACH Academic Boards?” 

UM: "Wir tauschen uns regelmäßig im Rahmen unserer monatlichen Calls über unsere Ergebnisse und Fortschritte aus. Außerdem sind wir alle so vielseitig interessiert, dass die meisten von uns in mehreren Arbeitsgruppen sind und wir auch über diese direkten Wege kommunizieren. "

JMG: "Die Zusammenarbeit funktioniert mittlerweile sehr gut. Wir haben sie schrittweise aufgebaut, was natürlich nicht von Anfang an möglich war. Jetzt schaffen wir Anreize, um die Vernetzung aufrechtzuerhalten. Wir laden Forschende, Studierende, Doktorandinnen und Doktoranden ein, sich zu beteiligen, und fördern auch die Möglichkeit einer Co-Betreuung aus anderen Gruppen. Das klappt gut, vor allem durch die Strukturen, die wir im Board etabliert haben, die die Prozesse vereinfachen, auch administrative Abläufe erleichtern und das Vorhandensein von Forschungsdaten sicherstellen.

Darüber hinaus arbeiten wir an Qualitätsstandards, die auch die anderen Arbeitsgruppen im Board verfolgen. Dies öffnet Türen für neue Kooperationen und für Forschende, die wir einladen oder die wir einladen können. Es geht darum, ein gemeinsames Bild zu vermitteln, und das ist ohne den internationalen Aspekt heute nicht mehr möglich. "

AB: “Welche konkreten Ziele verfolgt Eure Arbeitsgruppe?” 

UM: "Unser Ziel ist es, den Kolleginnen und Kollegen konkrete Formate und Wege aufzuzeigen, wie sie in internationale Kooperationen eintreten können. Darüber hinaus möchten wir die Vernetzung aktiv unterstützen, unter anderem über Plattformen wie Miro, die wir momentan nutzen, um den Austausch und die Zusammenarbeit zu fördern. "

HS: “Die stärkere Zusammenarbeit mit den anderen Academic Boards weltweit und die engere Zusammenarbeit mit der akademischen Community in DACH wollen wir aktiv angehen und uns dabei auch in neue Formate stärker einbringen, wie z.B. in die internationalen SAP Learning Journeys und die SAP Business Process Open Lecture welche die bewährten Angebote der SAP University Competence Center (UCCs) ergänzen können.”

AB: “Wie können interessierte Lehrende in Eurer Arbeitsgruppe mitarbeiten und mit Euch in Kontakt treten?”

JMG: "Interessierte Lehrende können mich gerne direkt ansprechen – die Kontaktdaten sind bekannt. Wir fördern die gemeinsame Entwicklung von Modulen und den Austausch von Lehrinhalten innerhalb der bestehenden Partnerschaften. Dazu gehört auch die Zusammenarbeit mit den International Offices, um Zugang zu relevanten Daten und Fördermöglichkeiten zu erhalten.

Es gibt viele Möglichkeiten, sich zu engagieren, sei es durch Studierendenaustausch, Dozentenaustausch oder die gemeinsame Betreuung von Abschlussarbeiten. Der kollaborative Gedanke sollte grenzüberschreitend weitergelebt werden. Wir steigen in bestehende Netzwerke ein, die den Einstieg erleichtern und die Zusammenarbeit mit internationalen Partnern ermöglichen.

Es macht wirklich Spaß, und ich kann nur jedem empfehlen, sich mit internationalen Projekten zu beschäftigen. Man lernt so viel und erhält wirklich viel zurück. Forschung und Lehre auf Augenhöhe sind der Schlüssel – wir lernen genauso viel von den Partneruniversitäten wie sie von uns. "

AB: “Vielen Dank für Eure Antworten und ich freue mich auf eine weitere gute Zusammenarbeit mit Euch.”

entry.title: Re: Encapsulation of Crystal Reports 8.5 library in Windo...
entry.content: Hello, Don Williams, thank you very much for the information.

entry.title: Re: Issue in changing Account Group of a Customer
entry.content:
In general, you cannot go from a liberal setting in field status to a more restrictive setting.

 

The report CVI_CHECK_ACC_GRP_CHANGE_CUST may be used to check what is preventing the change of account group. If you enter the customer and the desired target account group you will get the details of the field status that is preventing the change.

If the current account group of the customer permits (allows or requires) a field but that field is "suppressed" in the target account group, then the change is not possible unless you change the config settings to match them both.

The other way around is permitted. You can go from a restrictive (Suppressed) setting to a liberal (Optional or required) setting. But you need to enter the incomplete (incremental) data to fulfil the requirements of the target account group.

entry.title: Re: Add Mass Excel Data Updates in any Standard SAP Fiori App Using the UI5 Spreadsheet Importer
entry.content:
Hi, Experts.

Can I send the filename ( ex.: Test.xls ) to backend in Abap RAP? I have developing app in RAP with Fiori Elements

tks.

entry.title: Hi Experts, Asset got created & splitted into 5 assets & got reversed & Net book value 0.01 exists
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

User is in ECC system. Asset got created 9646.02 & splitted to 5 different assets (4 assets with value  1929.20 & 1 asset with value 1929.22). Splitted assets have depreciation amount 22.97, 22.96, 22.97, 22.96 & 22.97. Now these assets are reversed. For newly created assets 1,3,5 Ordinary Depreciation 22.97 & Value Adjustment amount is 22.97-. No issues. However for assets 2 & 5 Ordinary Depreciation 22.97 & value adjustment 22.96-. This brings Net Book Value as 0.01.

Do we have any solution to avoid these scenarios.
